query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A tight close-up of the upper face of a person with light skin, showing both eyes, the bridge of the nose, and light brown eyebrows. The irises are blue-gray. The left eye contains a bright red circular reflection at the center of the pupil with a small white specular highlight, while the right eye shows a dark pupil with a similar white highlight. Fine eyelashes are visible along the upper eyelids, and natural skin texture is apparent across the forehead and around the eyes.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A tight close-up of the upper face of a person with light skin, showing both eyes, the bridge of the nose, and light brown eyebrows. The irises are blue-gray. Harsh, direct on-camera flash lighting creates an unflattering snapshot aesthetic and causes a prominent red reflection in the left pupil, while the right pupil appears dark. Fine eyelashes are visible along the upper eyelids, and natural skin texture is apparent across the forehead and around the eyes.
